text:
the lagna or to that of the seventh house on the
day of birth has to be taken as final. If the Moon is above the
horizon the "A" days have to be added to 273 day; otherwise
they have to be deducted.
We shall note the S.T. for the Moon's position and its oppo
site sign at the assumed time of birth. Deduct the S.T. at noon
on the day of germination from the S.T. of the Moon's longi
tude at birth, or of the Moon's longitude plus 180 degree at
birth. If the germination time is before noon, take the previous
day's S.T. at noon. The result is the local time of germination.
Then find the longitude of the Moon at that time.
Consider the example already referred to. The birth was
on 1920.1.22 at 11.06 AM(IST) or 10.58.36 A.M. (LMT). The
Latitude is 16 deg.19'N, and longitude 80 deg.39'E. The side
real time of birth was 18 deg.59'.44"·087 and the Ayanamsa was
22 deg.44'.42"·81• Lagna is 355 deg.45'.34"·7 and the seventh
house cusp is 175 deg.45'.34"·7 The Sun was on 278 deg.10'.3"
•
